title: BUSINESS DAMAGE ASSESSMENT SURVEY - 211info
text: NATURAL DISASTER RESOURCES DOUGLAS COUNTY BUSINESS DAMAGE ASSESSMENT SURVEY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Douglas County is seeking reports from business owners, churches, or nonprofit organizations whose property was damaged in the recent flood that began on March 16, 2025. No damage is too minor to report. Confidential Address Eligibility: Business owners that experienced property damage during the March 2025 flood Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Disaster Declarations Information * Business Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - EVACUATION INFORMATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATURAL DISASTER RESOURCES DOUGLAS COUNTY
